subject: CSV export fails on filtered dashboard
body: When I filter by region and export CSV, the download fails with an error. This blocks my Monday reporting.

subject: CSV download still broken
body: The same filtered dashboard CSV export failed again two hours later. I need the ticket list for leadership.

subject: Please add weekly digest controls
body: It would be helpful to choose which teams receive the weekly digest and preview it before sending.

subject: Login loop after password reset
body: After resetting my password I keep getting sent back to sign in. I cannot access the workspace.

subject: Invoice label is confusing
body: The invoice says platform usage but the billing page says seats. My finance team is asking what the charge means.

subject: Mobile view cuts off table columns
body: On iPhone, the issue cluster table hides source ticket IDs unless I rotate the screen.

subject: CSV export is slow but works
body: The export completed today, but it took almost five minutes for a small filtered dashboard.

subject: Slack report formatting request
body: Can the Slack report include bullet spacing and source ticket IDs under each insight?

subject: Notification emails arrive late
body: Alert emails for new high severity issues arrived about an hour late yesterday.

subject: Search times out for old tickets
body: Searching tickets older than six months times out and shows a failed request message.

subject: Need Zendesk connector
body: We use Zendesk as the source of truth and would like an import connector before rollout.

subject: Intercom import question
body: Can OpenVoC Radar pull Intercom conversations and preserve the original conversation IDs?
